queries.question: What options do we have for every insurance
queries.sql: SELECT Options.option_name  from Insurance_Options join Options on Insurance_Options.option_id = Options.id join Insurances on Insurance_Options.insurance_id = Insurances.id   GROUP BY Insurance_Options.option_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Insurance_Options.insurance_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Insurances)

queries.question: What options do we have for every insurance
queries.sql: select insurances.policy_holder , options.option_name from Insurance_Options join Options on Insurance_Options.option_id = Options.id join Insurances on Insurance_Options.insurance_id = Insurances.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?policy_holder ?option_name WHERE {
  ?insurance_options a :Insurance_Options .
  ?options a :Options .
  ?insurance_options p:hasOptions ?options .
  ?insurances a :Insurances .
  ?insurance_options p:hasInsurances ?insurances .
  ?insurances p:name ?policy_holder .
  ?options p:name ?option_name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What options do we have for every insurance
